content.body: Good name for an alias of type `property key or Private Name`? `propertyName`?
content.formatted_body: Good name for an alias of type property key or Private Name? propertyName?

content.body: I might use just _key_. _propertyName_ is more like https://tc39.es/ecma262/multipage/ecmascript-data-types-and-values.html#property-name , which implies **exclusion** of symbols and private names.
content.formatted_body: I might use just key. propertyName is more like https://tc39.es/ecma262/multipage/ecmascript-data-types-and-values.html#property-name , which implies exclusion of symbols and private names.

content.body: I just remembered that we need to include recent ecmarkup improvements (https://github.com/tc39/ecmarkup/releases/tag/v24.1.0) in our editor update slides for the next plenary
let's collectively try not to forget to do that
